meaning: n.[药]茶苯海明,晕海宁(抗组织胺药,源出商标名)
examples: Pharmacist: Take a dramamine pill thirty minutes before the journey starts.
Wash down Dramamine, sink into the rocking diesel, the asphalt road through the hills.
In fact, at least one study found ginger to work just as well as Dramamine (dimenhydrinate) and other nausea-stopping drugs, with the added benefit that it doesn't make you sleepy.
So if all this has you reaching for the Maalox or the Dramamine, I understand.
So, the normally blessed businesspeople of Asia just might have had to swallow a Dramamine as they headed into the weekend.
